meaning: n.(绾圭珷涓婄殑)鍙岃冻椋為緳
examples: The Caster summons a Wyvern and binds it to his service.
Wyvern Sting cooldown has been lowered from 1.5min to 1min.
The Wyvern is a large, scaly beast with leathery wings and a poison stinger.
The bid is supported by three Laverstock secondary schools, Wyvern College, St Edmund's and St Joseph's.
Wyvern Community School, in Marchfields Way, will now transform into the Hans Price Academy on 1 May.
